name: io.github.0rkz/byte-protocol
description: PayPerByte — per-byte data for AI agents: x402 USDC on Base, EIP-712-attested. No token.

environmentVariables.description: Ethereum private key for write/buy tools (subscribe, unsubscribe, publish, buy_data). buy_data spends real Base-mainnet USDC — use a dedicated wallet. Not required for read-only tools.
environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: RPC for the on-chain library + EIP-712 attestation layer (Arbitrum Sepolia, eip155:421614). The x402 buy rail settles USDC on Base mainnet and needs no RPC here. Defaults to Arbitrum Sepolia public RPC.
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL
